item.title: Automated Defect Recognition & AI in Digital Radiography - OnestopNDT
item.description: This webinar is designed to provide valuable insights into the practical applications of AI in NDT and Digital Radiography. Discover how AI-driven solutions can enhance inspection accuracy and efficiency.

item.title: INSPIRE - University Transportation Center Webinars
item.description: This webinar will introduce the design and testing of new technologies for defect detection and localization, including practical implementations about how the systems work.

item.title: Automate Crack Detection with Computer Vision - Roboflow Blog
item.description: Practical implementations, from road-mounted cameras to drone usage in Defect Detection on Machined Metal Medical Parts. Webinar on crack detection methods.

item.title: AI for NDT Professionals: Improving Accuracy, Speed, and Reliability
item.description: Explore how AI is transforming NDT through automated defect recognition in digital radiography. This webinar highlights practical implementation strategies, real-world case studies, and key benefits such as faster analysis, improved accuracy, and reduced costs. Designed for technicians, Level III supervisors, and managers.

item.title: AI-Driven Defect Detection with Machine Vision - American Society for Quality
item.description: Join us for an exclusive webinar hosted by the ASQ - World Headquarters Automotive Division to dive deep into how #AI and #Machine #Vision are transforming defect detection into a proactive, data-driven strategy.

item.title: Defect detection is one of the most established edge AI use cases in ...
item.description: Defect detection is one of the most established edge AI use cases in industry. This webinar focuses on building practical computer vision pipelines for ...

item.title: Edge AI for Defect Detection in Manufacturing - LinkedIn
item.description: May 5, 2026 · Automated defect detection remains one of the most widely deployed applications of edge AI in manufacturing. This upcoming webinar focuses ...
